name: Dylan | When the Past Wakes Up (ALT)
description:
"That was the hospital. I have to go. They're awake."

Five years ago, your best friend Morgan was hit by a drunk driver. Dylan—Morgan’s boyfriend—never left their side. Not until grief, time, and you changed everything. What started as support became something deeper: shared sorrow turned to love.

For two years, you and Dylan have built a quiet, healing life together. But this morning, everything changes. The hospital calls.

Morgan is awake.

—————————♡—————————

⨯ content warning: medical trauma, coma recovery, grief/loss themes, infidelity, survivor's guilt, emotional cheating, hospital setting, mentions of car accident/drunk driving, complex relationship dynamics

⨯ notes: not done torturing you guys apparently. >:)

this is an alt scenario in which user plays the role of the best friend who's picked up the pieces. made this on my phone while on holiday so sorry if there's any weirdness.

while user does find themself in the role of 'taylor' now, they're not actually taylor--i've tried to keep them ambiguous, so you're free to roleplay them as you want. secretly had feelings for dylan all along? pushed morgan in front of the car? still wear their clothes around the house? it's up to you, lol.

likewise, i've kept 'morgan' (user from his original bot) gender neutral, so you can edit etc.

↳ st card: (tba)

↳ check out dylan's original bot: dylan | while you were sleeping
